scripts.test:e2e:core-base: playwright test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.ts tests/e2e/login-flow.spec.ts tests/e2e/customer-orders-list.spec.ts tests/e2e/customer-order-lookup.spec.ts tests/e2e/scheduled-time.spec.ts tests/e2e/menu-management.spec.ts tests/e2e/settings-management.spec.ts tests/e2e/store-availability.spec.ts tests/e2e/stock-availability.spec.ts --workers=1 --retries=1 --trace=off
scripts.test:e2e:core-commerce: playwright test tests/e2e/checkout-membership.spec.ts tests/e2e/coupon-management.spec.ts tests/e2e/coupon-claim-boundaries.spec.ts tests/e2e/coupon-claim-race.spec.ts tests/e2e/membership-management.spec.ts --workers=1 --retries=1 --trace=off
scripts.test:e2e:core-ops: playwright test tests/e2e/auth-guards.spec.ts tests/e2e/messages-realtime.spec.ts tests/e2e/order-chat-interactions.spec.ts tests/e2e/order-detail-cta.spec.ts tests/e2e/order-manager-confirmations.spec.ts tests/e2e/order-manager-cta.spec.ts tests/e2e/order-manager-refund-panel.spec.ts tests/e2e/order-refund.spec.ts --workers=1 --retries=1 --trace=off
scripts.test:e2e:core: npm run test:e2e:core-base && npm run test:e2e:core-commerce && npm run test:e2e:core-ops
